g.text: Blood Unit Management System - Sequence Diagrams
inputBloodUnit(uniqueID: String, abo: ABOType, rh: RhFactor, collectionDate: Date) : Response
Post1: uniqueID assigned, Post2: ABO/Rh recorded, Post3: expiry stored
State transition: available -> issued or issued -> available
Constraint: status changes must be logged
Post5: expired units flagged/removed from inventory
